title: XDeathsBans
description: Configurable death-based ban system for Minecraft servers. Set death limits, enable temp bans, and manage bans easily.
body:
# XDeathsBan

**XDeathsBan** is a mod designed for Minecraft servers that introduces a ban system based on the number of times a player dies. With this mod, server administrators can set a maximum death limit before a player is banned, configure whether only PvP deaths count, and customize the ban duration.

This mod is perfect for **hardcore** or **advanced survival** servers where death has real consequences, forcing players to be more strategic to avoid getting banned.

---

## đź› ď¸Ź Key Features
âś… **Automatic Bans**: Players will be banned upon reaching the configured death limit.  
âś… **PvP Mode**: Allows you to configure whether only PvP deaths count towards the ban.  
âś… **Temporary Bans**: Option to enable bans with a custom duration in ticks.  
âś… **Ban Management**: Commands to unban individual or all players.  
âś… **Configurable Settings**: Adjust ban settings in-game without restarting the server.  

---

## đźŽ® Commands and Usage

### đź“‹ Mod Configuration
Administrators can modify the mod settings in real time using the following commands:

đź“Ś **Check the current settings:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban settings status
```
đź’¬ Displays the allowed death count, whether bans are temporary, ban duration, and if only PvP deaths count.

đź“Ś **Set the maximum number of deaths before a ban:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban settings maxdeaths <number>
```
đź’¬ Defines how many times a player can die before being banned.

đź“Ś **Enable or disable PvP-only death counting:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban settings onlypvp <true|false>
```
đź’¬ If enabled (`true`), only PvP deaths will count towards banning a player.

---

### đźš« Ban Configuration
đź“Ś **Enable or disable temporary bans:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban ban bantemp <true|false>
```
đź’¬ Activates or deactivates temporary bans. If set to `false`, bans will be permanent.

đź“Ś **Set the temporary ban duration:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban ban bantime <ticks>
```
đź’¬ Defines how long a player will remain banned before they can rejoin.

_(1 second = 20 ticks, 1 minute = 1200 ticks)_

---

### đź”“ Ban Management
đź“Ś **Unban a specific player:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban unban <player>
```
đź’¬ Removes the ban for a specific player.

đź“Ś **Unban all players:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban unban all
```
đź’¬ Lifts the ban for all currently banned players.

đź“Ś **List all banned players:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban util listbans
```
đź’¬ Displays a list of all currently banned players.

đź“Ś **Reload the mod configuration:**  
```plaintext
/xdeathsban util reload
```
đź’¬ Reloads the settings from the JSON file without restarting the server.

---

## đźŽŻ Ideal Server Types
âś” **Hardcore and Semi-Hardcore**: Where death should have serious consequences.  
âś” **Competitive Survival**: Encouraging strategy and caution.  
âś” **PvP and War Servers**: To enforce bans on players who lose too many battles.  
âś” **Survival Events**: Eliminating players from an event after a set number of deaths.  

---
